purpose: Define the defracto.* and loc.* namespace split for cold-start readers.

definitions.defracto: product, conveyor, projection, release, and user-facing governance identity
definitions.loc: runtime, resolver, semantic execution, primitive catalog, and cross-language substrate identity

rules: Use loc.* for runtime substrate meaning.
A defracto artifact may depend on loc authority.
A loc artifact must not depend on Defracto product meaning.
blockedIf: runtime identity is presented as product identity
completionPosture: Namespace doctrine keeps the resolver from becoming a competing project identity.
